meta.title: Whit Diffie's S4x07 Keynote on the History of Cryptology
meta.description:
This was the first keynote at the first S4 ever. Whit played a huge role in the development of a crypto community, and we wanted to begin to develop an ICS security community through, at least in part, S4. I think we generously called the attendance at 40, and you see the people and room in the Q&A at the end.

This is a great lecture on the history of cryptology, including very importantly how he and Marty Hellman developed public key cryptography. It's full of interesting facts and personal stories.
